not_claimed: does not reproduce sbomify historical top-15k 37-invalid list because that named list was not found in public sources during this check
does not perform full CycloneDX/SPDX schema validation; SPIRA V5 checks a narrow wheel metadata/component consistency subset
live pypi-tea invalid means schema-validation invalid, which is a different predicate from SPIRA SBOM_INCONSISTENT/SBOM_INVALID in this survey
source_note: Live pypi-tea invalid-SBOM endpoint; not the historical March 2026 top-15k list of 37 invalid SBOMs.
